description: Style Note Intimately Beckham adds a touch of class to all your memorable and romantic moments. Perfect for those special occasions where you need to be at your best.Product Details Top notes are grapefruit, bergamot and cardamom middle notes are nutmeg, violet and star anise base notes are sandalwood, amber and patchouliCaution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesQuantity75ml
